title: Nvidia’s Huang Says Mythos Shows Need for US-China AI Dialogue
snippet: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang said that Anthropic PBC’s Mythos breakthrough shows that the US should seek greater cooperation with China so artificial intelligence researchers in the world’s two larg…
contentText: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang said that Anthropic PBC’s Mythos breakthrough shows that the US should seek greater cooperation with China so artificial intelligence researchers in the world’s two largest economies can agree on how to safely use the increasingly powerful technology.

title: Canada’s Champagne to Discuss Anthropic at Meeting With Bessent
snippet: Canada’s finance minister plans to discuss Anthropic PBC’s Mythos model when he meets with US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent this week.
contentText: Canada’s finance minister plans to discuss Anthropic PBC’s Mythos model when he meets with US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent this week.

title: S&P Hits Record High as Ceasefire Hopes Fuel Rally | The Close 4/15/2026
snippet: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are BlackRock’s Russ Brownback, JLL CEO Christian…
contentText: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are BlackRock’s Russ Brownback, JLL CEO Christian Ulbrich, CFRA’s Ken Leon, Elm Wealth Founder Victor Haghani, RBC Capital Markets’ Amy Wu Silverman, Kroll CEO Jake Silverman, Barclays’ William Thompson, Portal Innovations CEO John Flavin, & Wedbush Securities’ Michael Pachter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK’s Starmer Summons US Social Media Firms Over Online Safety
snippet: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer will meet with representatives from the largest US tech companies to discuss ways to keep children safe online, as global appetite to ban social media services for young users grows.
contentText: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer will meet with representatives from the largest US tech companies to discuss ways to keep children safe online, as global appetite to ban social media services for young users grows.

title: Anthropic Draws Investor Offers at Over $800 Billion Value | Bloomberg Tech 4/15/2026
snippet: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss why Anthropic has rebuffed investors' efforts to back the company with funding that would value it at more than $800 billion. Plus, Meta expands a multi-billion-dollar par…
contentText: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss why Anthropic has rebuffed investors' efforts to back the company with funding that would value it at more than $800 billion. Plus, Meta expands a multi-billion-dollar partnership with Broadcom to design and build custom chips. And ASML, the supplier of cutting-edge chipmaking machines, raises its full-year sales forecast as AI demand fuels growth. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google-Linked Data Centers Selling Record $5.7 Billion Junk Bond
snippet: Data centers linked to Alphabet Inc.’s Google are seeking to raise $5.7 billion from a junk-bond sale, in what would be the largest deal of its kind to finance the artificial intelligence buildout boom.
contentText: Data centers linked to Alphabet Inc.’s Google are seeking to raise $5.7 billion from a junk-bond sale, in what would be the largest deal of its kind to finance the artificial intelligence buildout boom.

title: Apple, Google Offer ‘Nudify’ Apps Despite Policies Against Them
snippet: Apple Inc. and Google have continued to offer mobile apps that let users make nonconsensual sexualized images of people despite their policies prohibiting such content, according to a report published Wednesday by the T…
contentText: Apple Inc. and Google have continued to offer mobile apps that let users make nonconsensual sexualized images of people despite their policies prohibiting such content, according to a report published Wednesday by the Tech Transparency Project.

title: SpaceX Plans Site Visits for Large Investors as Mega-IPO Nears

title: OpenAI's $852B Valuation Not Too High: Vinod Khosla
snippet: Vinod Khosla, founder of Khosla Ventures, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." OpenAI has completed a deal to raise $122 billion from investors at an $852 billion valuation, marking the company’s largest funding roun…
contentText: Vinod Khosla, founder of Khosla Ventures, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." OpenAI has completed a deal to raise $122 billion from investors at an $852 billion valuation, marking the company’s largest funding round to date by far and bolstering its costly push for more chips, data centers and talent. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Eyes New Tech Rules With The Digital Fairness Act
snippet: Michael McGrath, European Commissioner for Democracy, Justice, the Rule of Law and Consumer Protection, joins Ed Ludlow to discuss the EU’s proposed Digital Fairness Act, aimed at strengthening online consumer protectio…
contentText: Michael McGrath, European Commissioner for Democracy, Justice, the Rule of Law and Consumer Protection, joins Ed Ludlow to discuss the EU’s proposed Digital Fairness Act, aimed at strengthening online consumer protections, and the broader transatlantic approach to regulating big tech. He speaks on “Bloomberg Tech.”

title: OpenAI updates its Agents SDK to help enterprises build safer, more capable agents

title: Tech Billionaires Push Pick for Governor
snippet: Tech billionaires are stepping up their efforts to boost San Jose Mayor Matt Mahan in the race for California governor, rushing into the vacuum left by Eric Swalwell’s abrupt exit amid allegations of sexual assault. Blo…
contentText: Tech billionaires are stepping up their efforts to boost San Jose Mayor Matt Mahan in the race for California governor, rushing into the vacuum left by Eric Swalwell’s abrupt exit amid allegations of sexual assault. Bloomberg’s Eliyahu Kamisher speaks with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB Between Baseline and Adverse Outcomes, Says Nagel
snippet: The European Central Bank is facing a pivotal decision at the end of the month--inflation risks are building daily as the Iran conflict drives energy prices higher. Joachim Nagel, Bundesbank president and governing coun…
contentText: The European Central Bank is facing a pivotal decision at the end of the month--inflation risks are building daily as the Iran conflict drives energy prices higher. Joachim Nagel, Bundesbank president and governing council member of the European Central Bank, says the ECB is between a baseline and an adverse scenario. He speaks with Bloomberg’s Francine Lacqua on the sidelines of the IMF Spring meetings in Washington. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ASML Won’t Be an AI Bottleneck, Says Berenberg's Qiu
snippet: ASML raised its full-year sales forecast, bringing it in line with analysts' estimates and attention is already turning to what the supplier of cutting-edge chipmaking machines can expect from 2027. Tammy Qiu, head of t…
contentText: ASML raised its full-year sales forecast, bringing it in line with analysts' estimates and attention is already turning to what the supplier of cutting-edge chipmaking machines can expect from 2027. Tammy Qiu, head of tech equity research at Berenberg, speaks with Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The musician-turned-biotech-founder waiting to fundraise
snippet: When Grammy-nominated singer-songwriter Aloe Blacc got COVID despite being vaccinated and boosted, he tried to fund research for a better solution. What he quickly found out? You can’t just write a check in biotech. Reg…
contentText: When Grammy-nominated singer-songwriter Aloe Blacc got COVID despite being vaccinated and boosted, he tried to fund research for a better solution. What he quickly found out? You can’t just write a check in biotech. Regulators require a commercialization plan, and philanthropy doesn’t move science through clinical trials or get you a license on university IP. Now, he’s bootstrapping a cancer drug platform targeting pancreatic cancer, a disease that […]
